lines.original: Indah larik pelangi, seusai hujan membuka hari
lines.translation: Beautiful rainbow array, after the rain opens the day

lines.original: Samar dirajut mega, garis wajahmu lembut tercipta
lines.translation: Samar knitted mega, the lines of your face are softly created

lines.original: Telah jauh kutempuh perjalanan, bawa sebentuk cinta
lines.translation: I have come a long way, bringing a form of love

lines.original: Desau rindu meresap, kenangan haru 'ku dekap
lines.translation: The longing sinks in, I embrace the emotional memories

lines.original: Semakin dekat tuntaskan penantian, kekasih aku pulang
lines.translation: The closer I get to the end of the wait, my lover comes home

lines.original: Kau dan aku jadi satu, arungi laut biru
lines.translation: You and I are one, sailing the blue sea

lines.original: Tak kan ada yang kuasa, mengusik haluannya
lines.translation: No one has the power to disturb his direction

lines.original: Kau dan aku jadi satu, sambut datangku
lines.translation: You and I are one, welcome me

lines.original: Sekian lama waktu telah mengurai makna
lines.translation: It's been so long since time has unraveled the meaning
Our love shines brightly over time

lines.original: Kan kubuat prasasti, dari tulusnya janji
lines.translation: I'll make an inscription, from a sincere promise

lines.original: Walau apa terjadi, tetap tegak berdiri
lines.translation: No matter what happens, keep standing tall

lines.original: Kau dan aku jadi satu, arungi laut biru
lines.translation: You and I are one, sailing the blue sea

lines.original: Tak kan ada yang kuasa, mengusik haluannya
lines.translation: No one has the power to disturb his direction

lines.original: Kau dan aku jadi satu, arungi laut biru
lines.translation: You and I are one, sailing the blue sea

lines.original: Kau dan aku jadi satu, bersama kita jemput impian
lines.translation: You and I are one, together we will fulfill our dreams
